case_title: BARDIA FARAHMAND VS. AT & T WIRELESS

docket_entries.description: ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL GRANTED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-04-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-04-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JEFF RODGERS--AREA RETAIL SALES MANAGER. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
